metadata.title: Novus Surfaces — Premium Surface Coatings | Worldwide Delivery
metadata.description: Novus Surfaces offers industrial-grade epoxy, polyurea, and quartz coating systems for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. Made in Canada, shipped worldwide.

about.title: About Novus Surfaces
about.subtitle: Your premium surface coatings distributor — Worldwide delivery

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Novus Surfaces was born from the belief that every surface deserves an exceptional coating. In partnership with SCI Coatings, a Montreal-based manufacturer recognized for over 13 years, we offer the world the most high-performance coating systems on the market.
story.p2: Our model is simple: we select the best products, provide impeccable technical support, and deliver directly from the factory to your job site, anywhere in the world.

partnership.title: SCI Coatings Partnership
partnership.description: Manufactured in Montreal by SCI Coatings Inc., a Canadian leader in industrial surface coatings since 2011.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Every product is tested and certified for the most demanding environments.

service.title: Personalized Service
service.description: Tailored support from product selection to installation.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Constantly improved formulations pushing the limits of performance.
